name: Aura Pods Pro
description: Next-generation wireless earbuds featuring hybrid active noise cancellation, custom high-excursion drivers, and adaptive audio transparency. Encased in a tactile, bead-blasted aluminum charging case.
specs: 30 Hours total playtime with charging case

name: Aura Watch Ultra
description: The ultimate adventure companion. Engineered with an aerospace-grade titanium case, dual-frequency precision GPS, and a stunning 2000-nits sapphire glass OLED display. Designed to endure extreme conditions.
specs: Up to 72 Hours battery life in low power mode

name: Aura Arc
description: Immersive studio sound meets ergonomic excellence. These premium over-ear wireless headphones combine an advanced acoustic system with soft lambskin memory foam earcups and a lightweight carbon fiber headband.

name: Aura Beam
description: Transform any room into a cinematic oasis. A 4K ultra-short throw laser projector that outputs 2500 ANSI lumens, delivering vibrant, razor-sharp imagery up to 120 inches from just inches away from the wall.
specs: Android TV integration with HDR10 support

name: Aura Charge 3-in-1
description: Declutter your nightstand with elegance. Crafted from a single block of walnut wood and precision-milled aluminum, this stand charges your phone, smartwatch, and wireless earbuds simultaneously at maximum speeds.

name: Aura Key Keyboard
description: A masterpiece of typing tactile response. Features a solid CNC-milled brass base plate, gasket-mounted PCB structure, hot-swappable switches, and hand-lubricated linear switches encased in frosted acrylic.
specs: CNC Anodized Brass & Frosted Acrylic case

name: Aura Sight Display
description: The pinnacle of desktop immersion. A 34-inch curved QD-OLED professional monitor featuring a 175Hz refresh rate, 0.03ms response time, and infinite contrast ratio. Perfectly tuned for both productivity and gaming.

name: Aura Soundbar
description: Bring multi-dimensional theater audio home. A premium standalone soundbar incorporating 7 drivers, upward-firing height channels, and virtual Dolby Atmos processing wrapped in recycled wool-blend fabric.
specs: HDMI eARC connection for lossless playback

name: Aura Pad Heated Desk Mat
description: Elevate your workspace comfort. Hand-crafted from full-grain vegetable-tanned leather, this desk mat includes a built-in smart heating element with three temperature levels and automatic shutoff.
specs: Safe low-voltage carbon fiber heating element

name: Aura Pack Backpack
description: A minimalist shell for your daily essentials. Built with ultra-tough X-Pac waterproof fabric, modular interior pockets, quick-access laptop sleeve, and magnetic Fidlock buckles.
specs: Suspended laptop compartment fits up to 16" devices
